raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Consumer Portal Support Team, I am writing to formally dispute several unauthorized charges on my account. My mother 's card was recently lost, and it has since been used to make transactions that were not authorized by either of us. 

Please let me know what specific information or documentation you require to proceed with this dispute and secure the account. 
XX/XX/XXXX {$100.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$180.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$160.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$19.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$180.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$42.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$38.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$38.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$30.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$85.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$110.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$63.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$220.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$27.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$120.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$22.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$27.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$40.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$22.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$1100.00} I am writing to report a significant number of unauthorized charges on our account. We did not authorize these transactions, and I am concerned that they were approved despite occurring within a short period and in locations where neither I nor my mother have ever been. 

Please investigate these transactions and provide guidance on the next steps to secure our account and dispute these charges. 

Best regards, XXXX XXXX
